studies.title: Evaluation study of digital tinnitus counseling Meine Tinnitus App

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about 'Meine Tinnitus App', which matches the product name provided. The title and full text explicitly mention 'Meine Tinnitus App' as the digital application being evaluated.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a block-randomized controlled trial, which involves random allocation of participants to an intervention group and a control group, fulfilling the criteria for an RCT.
